+JNIEXPORT jboolean JNICALL
+Java_runtime_valhalla_inlinetypes_TestJNIIsValueObject_isValueObject(JNIEnv* env, jclass klass, jobject target) {
+  return (*env)->IsValueObject(env, target);
+}
